title: LWC
description: An actively maintained version of the LWC block protection plugin
body:
## About

LWC is the longest-lived single block protection plugin, that protects both the blocks themselves and their contents. Originally designed in 2010 for locking chests (hence the name "Lightweight Chests"), it can be configured to lock any block. LWC Extended (or LWCX) is a fork of LWC which aims to provide extended updates and support for the plugin.

## Help & Support

First time using LWC? Fortunately, the plugin is easy to use. Simply download, drop it into your plugins folder, and restart your server -- blocks such as chests should now lock automatically when placed!

Information on how to use and configure LWCX is available [on our wiki](https://github.com/pop4959/LWCX/wiki).

For additional support [join us on Discord](https://discord.gg/PHpuzZS)!

### Author's Note
Permission was granted by Hidendra (the original author of LWC) to release forks of the plugin. Unfortunately, the original version of the plugin is no longer available (however, there are few major changes between this version and the original).

### Bolt

Also check out my new plugin [Bolt](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bolt), which is a modern LWC alternative that boasts numerous improvements over LWC (see [here](https://github.com/pop4959/Bolt/wiki#why-bolt)). Keep in mind that LWC continues to be fully supported and will receive the usual updates as always. For more information, visit the plugin page or ask on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/PHpuzZS) in the LWC / Bolt channels. Thank you for your support!
